hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qE "(gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create)|(git[[:space:]]+checkout[[:space:]]+-b)|(git[[:space:]]+switch[[:space:]]+(-c|--create))|(git[[:space:]]+branch[[:space:]]+[^-])"; then printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED by project policy (CLAUDE.md): this repo requires committing DIRECTLY to main. Do NOT create a branch or open a pull request. Commit and push to main instead: git add -A && git commit -m ... && git push origin main.\"}}"; fi
